title: Various 2XX Questions
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu May 27, 2010 4:41 pm I have noticed some things that I really hope you can help me figure out: 1: Why did Kaji told Shinji to take Touji and Kensuke to the aquarium [let alone Pen-Pen], if it was a school trip, then why only they and not the whole group? If only the Eva pilots, why they too? Note: I always took as weird the interest Kaji had on Shinji in NGE... In NME [NME as in New Movie Edition, consistent with the forum name change] it's almost akward that Kaji tells him about Misato's past, and everything else... I do not see the plot purpouse of this, anyone does? 2: just where are Misato and Ritsuko in the scene previous to the preparations of the Evas before the Sahaquiel's battle? 3: is the Dummy system made out of Rei? Because in 1.11 they say it had already passed the preliminary tests (if so, on which eva they tested it?) and in 2.o they reveal that it was not even built in Japan... 4: Why did Hikari, Touji and Kensuke had Pen-Pen during the battle with Zeruel? You can see him with them little after the buch of missiles launched a Zeruel's face explote. 5: why was Shinji alone in a bunker that looked more like an abandoned warehouse? Other things: Did ya noticed that after Mari shows him what remains of the Geo-front after Rei exploted the missile, Shinji runs to the pyramid through the watermelon patch? It's there all burned and charcoaled, I hadn't notice in the cam rip, it's really sad actually...

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu May 27, 2010 5:08 pm arael wrote: I always took as weird the interest Kaji had on Shinji in NGE... In NME [NME as in New Movie Edition, consistent with the forum name change] it's almost akward that Kaji tells him about Misato's past, and everything else... I do not see the plot purpouse of this, anyone does?

[]:             Quote Post by darthikari » Thu May 27, 2010 9:58 pm As for the dummy plug, I was just thinking.... What if the plug is made from Mari? She is Za Beasto after all......

[]:             Quote Post by VadersBlade » Thu May 27, 2010 10:33 pm Konbanwa, Robiru san! Mari would be a good fit for the dummy plug. She's obviously been groomed or engineered to pilot an Eva and make it do things others can't. She can also pilot units she's not synched with, such as unit 02.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri May 28, 2010 12:55 am arael wrote: 1: Why did Kaji told Shinji to take Touji and Kensuke to the aquarium [let alone Pen-Pen]

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 28, 2010 3:46 am SaltyJoe wrote: In fact, IIRC, "Golgotha" was mentioned as the codename for Nerv Japan's secondary base at Matsushiro in the original series (my memory is a tad hazy on this one, though).

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri May 28, 2010 9:52 am Reichu, your memory serves you well. Golgotha was never mentioned at any point in the old series.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri May 28, 2010 10:51 am arael wrote: 5: why was Shinji alone in a bunker that looked more like an abandoned warehouse?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri May 28, 2010 1:34 pm Because Shinji being passively borderline-suicidal is TOTALLY NEW. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri May 28, 2010 2:25 pm Reichu wrote: "Golgotha" was never mentioned in the original series.

If only the Eva pilots, why they too? Note: I always took as weird the interest Kaji had on Shinji in NGE... In NME [NME as in New Movie Edition, consistent with the forum name change] it's almost akward that Kaji tells him about Misato's past, and everything else... I do not see the plot purpouse of this, anyone does? 2: just where are Misato and Ritsuko in the scene previous to the preparations of the Evas before the Sahaquiel's battle? 3: is the Dummy system made out of Rei? Because in 1.11 they say it had already passed the preliminary tests (if so, on which eva they tested it?) and in 2.o they reveal that it was not even built in Japan... 4: Why did Hikari, Touji and Kensuke had Pen-Pen during the battle with Zeruel?
